risks.title: Schema migration breaks existing queries
risks.evidence: Adding releaseDate DateTime? to MonthlyRevenue changes the Prisma schema. Existing queries using year/month filter may not be updated.
risks.mitigation: P14 query gate proposal covers RuleBasedStockAnalyzer (HIGH risk) and FundamentalResearchService (HIGH risk) — both require explicit code patch in P16.
risks.nextPhaseAction: P16: Apply query gate patches before running prisma migrate dev
risks.approvalImpact: Blocking if patches not applied before migration

risks.title: Backfill inference introduces systematic date bias
risks.evidence: INFERRED_NEXT_MONTH_10TH rule assumes all Taiwan revenue is released exactly on the 10th. In practice some stocks release earlier or later.
risks.mitigation: Field declared as releaseDateSource=INFERRED with confidence LOW_TO_MEDIUM. Query gate checks releaseDateSource; authoritative data can override.
risks.nextPhaseAction: P16: Ensure backfill SQL sets releaseDateSource=INFERRED_NEXT_MONTH_10TH and releaseDateConfidence=LOW_TO_MEDIUM
risks.approvalImpact: Non-blocking if confidence field is populated correctly

risks.title: Query gate regression — existing tests fail after patch
risks.evidence: P14 full suite = 1438/1438 PASS (pre-patch). Post-patch query gate changes to RuleBasedStockAnalyzer may break callers that do not pass asOfDate.
risks.mitigation: P14 fixture dry-run 11/11 PASS covers all gate edge cases. Test coverage must be verified again post-patch in P16.
risks.nextPhaseAction: P16: Run full test suite after applying query gate patches; target 1438+ PASS
risks.approvalImpact: Blocking if full suite drops below baseline

risks.title: Historical replay comparability affected by releaseDate backfill
risks.evidence: P3 active scoring corpus uses year/month period to filter MonthlyRevenue. After migration, replay results may differ slightly due to date-gated availability.
risks.mitigation: Frozen corpus files (P0/P1/P3/P4) are not modified. Replay comparability is maintained by design — frozen lines verified: P0=4500, P1=9900, P3=4500.
risks.nextPhaseAction: P16: Verify replay outputs before/after schema migration using frozen corpus
risks.approvalImpact: Non-blocking if frozen corpus verified unchanged

risks.title: Rollback incomplete — column DROP may lose backfilled data
risks.evidence: Rollback Strategy B (drop columns) is irreversible. Any backfilled releaseDateSource/releaseDateConfidence data would be lost.
risks.mitigation: P14 rollback draft includes Strategy A (set fields to NULL) as soft rollback. Strategy B (drop) is documented as hard rollback requiring explicit decision.
risks.nextPhaseAction: P16: Default to Strategy A rollback; Strategy B requires explicit DBA approval

risks.title: Production DB safety — unintended writes during migration
risks.evidence: P14 approvalStatus=NOT_APPROVED; productionApplyAllowed=false on all artifacts. Current state: no DB writes have occurred.
risks.mitigation: All P14 utilities hardcode productionApplyAllowed=false. P15 utilities maintain this invariant. P16 requires explicit approval token to unlock.
risks.nextPhaseAction: P16: Only unlock after explicit approval token P14_APPROVE_SCHEMA_MIGRATION_DRY_RUN_ONLY provided
risks.approvalImpact: Hard blocker — must not be bypassed

risks.title: PIT leakage residual — releaseDate not yet enforced in production code
risks.evidence: P13 source audit: RuleBasedStockAnalyzer uses year/month gate (HIGH risk leakage). FundamentalResearchService has no asOf gate (HIGH risk leakage). MonthlyRevenue schema lacks releaseDate.
risks.mitigation: P14 query gate proposal documents all three patch targets. Patches are proposed but not applied — requires P16 schema migration first.
risks.nextPhaseAction: P16: Apply schema migration, then apply query gate patches; revalidate P13 PIT gate (35/35 target)
risks.approvalImpact: Non-blocking for approval review — leakage documented and mitigated in P16 plan

risks.title: Reason/scoring downstream impact from releaseDate enforcement
risks.evidence: alphaScore and recommendationBucket depend on fundamentals. After releaseDate gate enforcement, some records previously available may become gated, potentially changing scores.
risks.mitigation: P15 review confirms scoring formula and alphaScore/recommendationBucket are NOT modified. Impact limited to data availability — not formula changes.
risks.nextPhaseAction: P16: Post-migration comparison of score distributions before/after; expect minor shifts for asOf dates near the 10th of each month
risks.approvalImpact: Non-blocking if scoring formulas are not changed

disclaimer: Does not constitute investment advice. Does not compute ROI, profit, alpha, win-rate, edge, or outperformance. Governance / risk register only. No production DB writes.
